title: Pesan Terakhir di Jembatan Layang
theme: Menjelajahi bagaimana teknologi yang kita anggap remeh bisa menyimpan rahasia kecil yang mengubah persepsi kita tentang rutinitas sehari-hari.

cover.prompt: A lone figure on a modern scooter, viewed from behind as a gentle silhouette, gracefully traversing an elevated pedestrian bridge. The vast city skyline of Jakarta unfolds beneath, softly blurred in the background. Subtle holographic AR interface elements glow on the rider's smart glasses, displaying abstract route information and data overlays. The scene is bathed in warm, soft morning light, with a visible, light urban breeze. Cinematic wide shot, emphasizing environmental grandeur and technological integration, using the rule of thirds and a shallow depth of field. Focus on the atmosphere of a new day in a dynamic metropolis.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Riko, a package courier, experiences unusual glitches in his AR smart glasses while crossing a pedestrian bridge. These glitches reveal an impossible delivery location: 'Titik Bisu' (Silent Point) beneath the bridge. Driven by curiosity, Riko investigates, discovering a hidden chamber containing a mysterious, glowing, pyramid-shaped artifact that projects a cryptic message. The experience leaves him with a profound sense of wonder and a new perception of the city's hidden realities, though the mystery remains largely unsolved.
